name: CustomChartRenderRegistry
summary: Exposes window.customChartRenderers for registering named chart renderers (native-first SVG default, Vega, Plotly, ECharts, …) so any chart delegates drawing to one shared engine resolved through the injector chain. A renderer declares the L-tier of the Vega-Lite profile it supports; the registry resolves a ChartSpec to its chosen impl behind the CustomChartRenderer contract.
